_meta.type: C (player-deduced meaning: the silent founding line, learned as lore)
_meta.payload_hygiene: PASS — no agy-authored string references the correct candidate (KORZAN / index 1 in 0-based ship-order) or any bridge to it (silence/listening/waiting/watchers/garden/monuments/memory/founding histories/name-roots). Verified by automated scan; see README.md.
_meta.note: correct ground-truth (KORZAN) is taken from candidate_C.md, NOT from any AI output. candidate_C.md numbers it index 2 in its 1-based table; in this 0-based ship-order array it is index 1. Kept only for the deterministic verifier; never passed to any AI layer or shown as a hint.
